# Learning Review: Seasonal Pricing Cache Staleness Incident (2026-03-12)

## Situation Snapshot

On 2026-03-12, a cache invalidation refactor (`pricing-service v2.4.1`, PR #1847) was deployed to the product pricing service. The change altered how TTL values are computed for category-specific cache entries, inadvertently bypassing the seasonal category's domain-mandated 15-minute TTL cap during active promotional windows. For 20 minutes (14:22–14:42 UTC), 847 customer transactions on seasonal
